name: Elegant Chicken Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Poach chicken in broth or water for about 20 minutes.
2. In a salad bowl, combine vinegar, orange juice, and Dijon mustard.
3. Gradually whisk in olive oil. Stir in chives and tarragon, and season with salt and pepper.
4. Cut the chicken into bite-sized pieces.
5. Add chicken and rice to the dressing.
6. Toss well.
